sevenDay.synopsis: All areas are VFR, and we should remain that way thru the forecast period. Winds will pick up today, gusting into the upper-20s. We'll be on the lookout for possible warning-level winds (G30kts). Windy conditions will stick with us thru Thursday. I'm not seeing any big weather-makers this week, so we will remain warm and dry with NEG hazards.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 07 APR - 13 APR
